notes: Connectors confirmed from the DCi Network series operation manuals (ManualsLib DCi 8|600N manual ID 678176 and DCi 4|2400N manual ID 3835678), which cover the same platform as the DCi 4|600N. Audio inputs are 6-pin euroblock phoenix connectors (2 per 4-channel model). Speaker outputs are Crown's proprietary 4-pole touch-proof terminal strips — mapped to euroblock as the closest available connector type, but they are large-gauge output terminals accepting up to 10 AWG, not standard 3.81mm euroblock. GPIO is a 6-position RJ-11 connector mapped to rj45 (closest in list). BLU Link grade eth-1g is inferred from 'Gigabit Ethernet-based technology' per manual; not explicitly stated as 1G on the product page. Power connector listed as 15A IEC on multiple retailer spec pages; IEC 320 C14 type confirmed from manual text ('Standard IEC type 320 inlet'). Rack height 2U confirmed across multiple sources.

ports.name: Input 1/2
ports.note: 6-pin phoenix/euroblock plug-in connector per input pair (channels 1–2). Balanced analog input, 3.81mm pin spacing. Crown P/N 5024623 replacement connector.

ports.name: Input 3/4
ports.note: 6-pin phoenix/euroblock plug-in connector per input pair (channels 3–4). Balanced analog input.

ports.name: Output 1/2
ports.note: 4-pole touch-proof terminal strip per channel pair (channels 1–2). Accepts bare wire or terminal forks up to 10 AWG. Not a standard euroblock — Crown proprietary touch-proof speaker terminal; euroblock is the closest listed connector.

ports.name: Output 3/4
ports.note: 4-pole touch-proof terminal strip per channel pair (channels 3–4). Same touch-proof terminal strip as Output 1/2.

ports.name: BLU Link In
ports.note: BLU Link digital audio transport input (HARMAN proprietary, Gigabit Ethernet-based, Cat5e). One of two BLU Link RJ45 ports on rear panel; up to 256 audio channels in a ring topology.

ports.name: BLU Link Out
ports.note: BLU Link digital audio transport output. Ring topology — connect Out to In on next device. Do not connect to standard Ethernet switch.

ports.name: Ethernet
ports.note: HiQnet TCP/IP network control and monitoring port for Audio Architect software. Cat5e cabling.

ports.name: GPIO
ports.note: 6-position RJ-11 connector (physically fits in RJ45 jack). 2 analog inputs, 2 digital outputs, +3.3V supply, and ground. Used for volume control, preset recall, error reporting. Closest listed connector is rj45; actual connector is RJ-11/6P6C.

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC 320 C14 inlet, 15A, 100–240V AC 50/60 Hz. Detachable power cord.
